errors.title: Booking request invalid
errors.explanation: The endpoint could not bind the incoming request into a booking command: one or more arguments were missing or invalid. Every failure is collected under this envelope, each with its full argument path.
errors.businessRule: Every required argument must be present, and every argument must convert into its value object.
errors.sourceDescription: Primary-port errors raised by the booking endpoint when it binds an incoming request into a command.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a request that violates the endpoint's contract (missing or malformed arguments).
diagnostics.analysisHint: Read the inner errors: each names the failing argument and the rule it violated.

examples.shortMessage: We could not accept your booking request.
examples.detailedMessage: One or more details of the booking request are missing or invalid.
examples.diagnosticMessage: The booking command is invalid: one or more request arguments failed to bind.

errors.title: Malformed booking date
errors.explanation: An incoming request carries a value that is not an ISO yyyy-MM-dd date, so it cannot be parsed into a BookingDate value object.
errors.businessRule: A booking date must be an ISO calendar date in the yyyy-MM-dd format.
errors.sourceDescription: Errors raised when parsing a booking date (check-in / check-out) from a request string.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a date in a locale-specific or malformed format, or an impossible calendar date.
diagnostics.analysisHint: Send dates in ISO 8601 yyyy-MM-dd form, for example 2026-08-10.

examples.detailedMessage: A booking date is not a valid ISO (yyyy-MM-dd) date.
examples.diagnosticMessage: '2026-13-40' is not a valid ISO (yyyy-MM-dd) date.

errors.title: Booking guest invalid
errors.explanation: A guest in the request's guests list could not be bound: its first name was missing or its e-mail was malformed. Its failures are grouped under this per-element envelope, with indexed paths such as Guests[1].
errors.businessRule: Each guest must have a first name, and any e-mail present must be valid.
errors.sourceDescription: Primary-port errors raised by the booking endpoint when it binds an incoming request into a command.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a guest with a missing first name or a malformed e-mail address.
diagnostics.analysisHint: Read the inner errors under the indexed Guests[i] path for the failing field.

examples.detailedMessage: One of the guests is missing a first name or has an invalid e-mail address.
examples.diagnosticMessage: The guest is invalid: one or more of its fields failed to bind.

errors.title: Booking stay invalid
errors.explanation: The stay sub-object of the request could not be bound: one or both of its dates were missing or malformed. Its failures are grouped under this nested envelope, with paths prefixed by Stay.
errors.businessRule: Both stay dates must be present and valid ISO dates.
errors.sourceDescription: Primary-port errors raised by the booking endpoint when it binds an incoming request into a command.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a stay with a missing or malformed check-in or check-out date.
diagnostics.analysisHint: Read the inner errors under the Stay path for the failing date.

examples.shortMessage: We could not read the stay dates.
examples.detailedMessage: The check-in or check-out date of the stay is missing or invalid.
examples.diagnosticMessage: The stay is invalid: one or more of its dates failed to bind.

errors.title: Malformed booking tag
errors.explanation: An element of the request's tag list is empty, too long, or contains whitespace, so it cannot be parsed into a Tag value object.
errors.businessRule: A tag must be a single non-empty token of at most 32 characters, without whitespace.
errors.sourceDescription: Errors raised when parsing a booking tag from an element of a request list.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a blank tag, a phrase containing spaces, or an over-long value.
diagnostics.analysisHint: Send each tag as a single whitespace-free token; join multi-word tags with a hyphen.

examples.detailedMessage: One of the booking tags is not a valid single token.
examples.diagnosticMessage: 'late checkout' is not a valid tag.

errors.title: Malformed currency code
errors.explanation: An incoming request carries a value that is not a well-formed three-letter currency code, so it cannot be parsed into a Currency value object.
errors.businessRule: A currency code must be exactly three upper-case ASCII letters (for example EUR).
errors.sourceDescription: Errors raised when parsing a billing currency code from a request string.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a currency in the wrong shape (lower-case, a symbol, a name, or the wrong length).
diagnostics.analysisHint: Send the ISO-4217 alphabetic code in upper case, for example USD or EUR.

examples.detailedMessage: The billing currency code is not a valid three-letter code.
examples.diagnosticMessage: 'EURO' is not a valid three-letter currency code.

errors.title: Malformed e-mail address
errors.explanation: An incoming request carries a value that is not a well-formed e-mail address, so it cannot be parsed into an EmailAddress value object.
errors.businessRule: A guest e-mail address must contain a single '@' with a non-empty local part and domain.
errors.sourceDescription: Errors raised when parsing a guest e-mail address from a request string.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a misspelled or truncated address (missing '@', empty local part or domain).
diagnostics.analysisHint: Validate the address on the client, and compare the sent value against the expected format.

examples.detailedMessage: The value provided is not a valid e-mail address.
examples.diagnosticMessage: 'not-an-email' is not a valid e-mail address.

errors.title: Non-positive number of nights
errors.explanation: An incoming request asks for zero or a negative number of nights, which is not a valid stay length.
errors.businessRule: A booking must be for at least one night.
errors.sourceDescription: Errors raised when building the number of nights from a request value.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a number of nights of zero or below.
diagnostics.analysisHint: Send a number of nights of one or more.

examples.shortMessage: The number of nights is invalid.
examples.detailedMessage: The requested number of nights must be one or more.
examples.diagnosticMessage: A booking must be for at least one night, but 0 was requested.

errors.title: Room number out of range
errors.explanation: An element of the request's room-number list is outside the supported 1-999 range.
errors.businessRule: A room number must be between 1 and 999 inclusive.
errors.sourceDescription: Errors raised when building a room number from an element of a request list.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a room number of zero, a negative value, or a value above 999.
diagnostics.analysisHint: Send room numbers within the supported 1-999 range.

examples.detailedMessage: One of the requested room numbers is outside the supported range.
examples.diagnosticMessage: Room number 1000 is outside the supported range 1-999.

errors.title: Check-out not after check-in
errors.explanation: Both stay dates parse, but the check-out date is on or before the check-in date, so the stay has no positive length. This cross-field rule is enforced by the Stay.Create factory.
errors.businessRule: Check-out must be strictly after check-in.
errors.sourceDescription: Errors raised when validating a stay's check-in and check-out dates together.

diagnostics.possibleCause: The client sent a check-out date equal to or earlier than the check-in date.
diagnostics.analysisHint: Send a check-out date at least one day after the check-in date.

examples.detailedMessage: The check-out date must be after the check-in date.
examples.diagnosticMessage: Check-out 2026-08-10 must be strictly after check-in 2026-08-14.
